summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates and hydrated first-hop refs. No GitHub mutations are planned. No item has complete merge preflight proof, so merge is not recommended in this run.

Narrow follow-up candidate for the Feishu monitor path, but merge requires review/preflight proof that is absent from the artifact.
Related to #94013, but the issue should stay open until the candidate fix is reviewed and validated.

Tracked as fixed-by-candidate for planning, but the issue must remain open until #94016 is reviewed/merged and closeout is separately allowed.
